mapper.select: SELECT P.EMP_ID, P.PRTPNT_NM, P.PROJ_NO, D.DEPT_NM, E.EMP_JBGD, COUNT(T.TASK_NO) as total, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.TASK_STTS = '대기' THEN 1 END), 0) as wait, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.TASK_STTS = '진행' THEN 1 END), 0) as prog, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.TASK_STTS = '완료' THEN 1 END), 0) as comp FROM PROJECT_PARTICIPANT P INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON (P.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID) INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD) LEFT OUTER JOIN TASK_PARTICIPANT TP ON (P.EMP_ID = TP.EMP_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN TASK T ON (TP.TASK_NO = T.TASK_NO AND P.PROJ_NO = T.PROJ_NO) WHERE P.PROJ_NO = #{projNo} GROUP BY P.EMP_ID, P.PRTPNT_NM, P.PROJ_NO, D.DEPT_NM, E.EMP_JBGD ORDER BY CASE E.EMP_JBGD WHEN '팀장' THEN 1 WHEN '대리' THEN 2 WHEN '주임' THEN 3 WHEN '사원' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, P.PRTPNT_NM

SELECT P.EMP_ID, P.PRTPNT_NM, P.PROJ_NO, D.DEPT_NM, E.EMP_JBGD, COUNT(TP.TASK_NO) as total, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.TASK_STTS = '대기' THEN 1 END), 0) as wait, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.TASK_STTS = '진행' THEN 1 END), 0) as prog, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.TASK_STTS = '완료' THEN 1 END), 0) as comp, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.TASK_IMPT = '높음' THEN 1 END), 0) as impt_high, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.TASK_IMPT = '보통' THEN 1 END), 0) as impt_normal, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN T.TASK_IMPT = '낮음' THEN 1 END), 0) as impt_low FROM PROJECT_PARTICIPANT P INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON (P.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID) INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD) LEFT OUTER JOIN TASK_PARTICIPANT TP ON (P.EMP_ID = TP.EMP_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN TASK T ON (TP.TASK_NO = T.TASK_NO AND P.PROJ_NO = T.PROJ_NO) WHERE P.PROJ_NO = #{projNo} GROUP BY P.EMP_ID, P.PRTPNT_NM, P.PROJ_NO, D.DEPT_NM, E.EMP_JBGD ORDER BY SUM( CASE WHEN T.TASK_STTS = '완료' AND T.TASK_IMPT = '높음' THEN 3 WHEN T.TASK_STTS = '완료' AND T.TASK_IMPT = '보통' THEN 2 WHEN T.TASK_STTS = '완료' AND T.TASK_IMPT = '낮음' THEN 1 WHEN T.TASK_STTS = '진행' THEN 0.5 ELSE 0 END ) DESC, comp DESC, CASE E.EMP_JBGD WHEN '팀장' THEN 1 WHEN '대리' THEN 2 WHEN '주임' THEN 3 WHEN '사원' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

SELECT A.CHAT_RM_NO, A.CHAT_RM_TTL, A.CHAT_RM_TYPE, A.CHAT_RM_BGNG_DT FROM CHAT_ROOM A INNER JOIN CHAT B ON A.CHAT_RM_NO = B.CHAT_RM_NO WHERE A.CHAT_RM_TYPE = '1' AND A.CHAT_RM_YN = 'Y' AND B.CHAT_RM_NO IN ( SELECT CHAT_RM_NO FROM CHAT WHERE EMP_ID IN (#{myId}, #{targetId}) GROUP BY CHAT_RM_NO HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EMP_ID) = 2 ) AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT WHERE CHAT_RM_NO = A.CHAT_RM_NO) = 2 GROUP BY A.CHAT_RM_NO, A.CHAT_RM_TTL, A.CHAT_RM_TYPE, A.CHAT_RM_BGNG_DT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT ( CHAT_RM_NO, EMP_ID, CHAT_USER_NM, CHAT_USER_AUTH, CHAT_USER_BGNG_DT ) VALUES ( #{chatRmNo}, #{empId}, (SELECT EMP_NM FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId}), #{chatUserAuth}, SYSDATE )
